post-install-cmd: php -r "\$keep=['DejaVuSans.ttf','DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf','FreeSerif.ttf','FreeSerifBold.ttf','XB Riyaz.ttf','XB RiyazBd.ttf','TaameyDavidCLM-Medium.ttf','.gitignore']; \$dir='vendor/mpdf/mpdf/ttfonts'; if(is_dir(\$dir)){ foreach(new DirectoryIterator(\$dir) as \$f){ if(!\$f->isDot()){ \$fn=\$f->getFilename(); \$s=in_array(\$fn,\$keep)||preg_match('/\\.(txt|license)$/i',\$fn); if(!\$s) @unlink(\$f->getPathname()); } } }"
post-update-cmd: php -r "\$keep=['DejaVuSans.ttf','DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf','FreeSerif.ttf','FreeSerifBold.ttf','XB Riyaz.ttf','XB RiyazBd.ttf','TaameyDavidCLM-Medium.ttf','.gitignore']; \$dir='vendor/mpdf/mpdf/ttfonts'; if(is_dir(\$dir)){ foreach(new DirectoryIterator(\$dir) as \$f){ if(!\$f->isDot()){ \$fn=\$f->getFilename(); \$s=in_array(\$fn,\$keep)||preg_match('/\\.(txt|license)$/i',\$fn); if(!\$s) @unlink(\$f->getPathname()); } } }"
